title: True Scale Mobs
description:
MicroMobs makes Minecraft’s world feel more natural and immersive by bringing mob sizes closer to their real-life counterparts.

Tiny insects become truly tiny, animals feel more believable, and the ecosystem becomes more dynamic.
body:
MicroMobs is a lightweight Fabric mod that adjusts the size of many mobs to better reflect their real-world biological proportions.

In vanilla Minecraft, many creatures are intentionally oversized for gameplay reasons. Spiders are huge, bees are large, and silverfish are much bigger than their real-world counterparts. also tadpole are made smaller

MicroMobs changes that.

This mod rescales many mobs so that insects become tiny, small animals feel more natural, and large creatures remain imposing, creating a more immersive ecosystem while keeping gameplay balanced.
